name: Alaska, Hawaii, and Possessions Port Use Tax Exclusion

eligibility.description: Applies to commercial cargo transported between the U.S. mainland and Alaska, Hawaii, or U.S. possessions for ultimate use or consumption in those destinations.

description: Excludes cargo from the 0.125% Harbor Maintenance Tax if it is loaded/unloaded in the U.S. mainland for consumption in Alaska, Hawaii, or U.S. possessions, or vice versa.
